segments.text: Not unto us, O Lord, not unto us, But to Your name give glory, Because of Your mercy, Because of Your truth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But our God is in heaven; He does whatever He pleases.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Their idols are silver and gold, The work of men's hands.
They have mouths, but they do not speak; Eyes they have, but they do not see;
They have ears, but they do not hear; Noses they have, but they do not smell;
They have hands, but they do not handle; Feet they have, but they do not walk; Nor do they mutter through their throat.
Those who make them are like them; So is everyone who trusts in them.
O Israel, trust in the Lord; He is their help and their shield.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: O house of Aaron, trust in the Lord; He is their help and their shield.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You who fear the Lord, trust in the Lord; He is their help and their shield.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord has been mindful of us; He will bless us; He will bless the house of Israel; He will bless the house of Aaron.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He will bless those who fear the Lord, Both small and great.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: May the Lord give you increase more and more, You and your children.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May you be blessed by the Lord, Who made heaven and earth.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The heaven, even the heavens, are the Lord's; But the earth He has given to the children of men.
The dead do not praise the Lord, Nor any who go down into silence.
But we will bless the Lord From this time forth and forevermore. Praise the Lord!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
